response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the experience bar with 15+ years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded work, including current staff-level full-stack TypeScript/Node.js product work and hands-on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), which is a rare and explicitly required skill. Strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses), polyglot proficiency, and cloud/container experience align well. Gaps are mostly framework-specific: no Nest.js or Kotlin exposure, and frontend history leans on Ember rather than React.
strengths: Direct AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience at staff/senior level with AWS, MongoDB, Docker/Kubernetes
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored testing tools and courses
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned; React appears in only one role while Ember.js dominates frontend history
No Kotlin and limited recent Java; significant career time invested in niche DLang ecosystem
No explicit Vitest/Jest/Playwright usage listed despite broader testing expertise

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited React depth
